title: Entry Identity, Idempotent Upsert, Revisions, and Deletion Semantics · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed operations review reconstructs entry identity, idempotent upsert, revisions, and deletion semantics from revision, tenant, source URL, request validators, response bytes, parsed identity, transaction, lease, state transition, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for idempotent versioned entry ingestion model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggi…
objectives: Bind external entry identity to feed scope and format semantics, detect collisions, and retain the raw identity basis.
Insert new, ignore unchanged, version changed, and quarantine conflicting entries atomically under unique constraints.
Store meaningful normalized revisions with source fetch, field diff, timestamps, and bounded retention instead of overwriting evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feed Go Reingestion Reconciliati…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 2677 during a PostgreSQL claim and failover drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove scoped identity, idempotent outcomes, revision history, tombstones, and replay convergence; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, compression, entity, depth, timeout, or publisher-budget failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Prove replay, reordered items, duplicate IDs, corrected dates, moved links, and partial failure converge on the same admitted state.

Inspect the Feed Go Reingestion Reconciliation trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
